summary: db-query-log fetches and executes remote code from an anonymous paste
details: The package advertises itself as a MySQL connector but adds a queryDBConnect method to its exported class that base64-decodes a hidden URL (stored as HASH_KEY = "aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanNvbmtlZXBlci5jb20vYi9RV1NMOQ", decoding to https://www.jsonkeeper.com/b/QWSL9), fetches the paste content via axios, and compiles it as a new Node Module via Module._compile(...) in the caller's process. jsonkeeper.com is a mutable, anonymous public paste service — the endpoint is attacker-controlled and its content can change at any time, providing an arbitrary remote-code-execution channel in the installer's process. The base64 encoding of the URL and the misleading HASH_KEY identifier are deliberate concealment. The package.json repository/description mirror the legitimate divbloxjs/dx-db-connector project, so consumers expecting that upstream instead receive an attacker-controlled loader.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
